name: Harmony Design System — React + MUI
description: Harmony Design System implemented with React and Material UI.

gaps: componentDefaults (input, label, badge) — deferred to Input/Badge component conversion via components.Mui* overrides
Colors.notes: MUI v9 theme from vendored token JSON (src/tokens/, tokens.css, global.css). Verifier PASS iteration 4 (2026-07-06).

gaps: Primitive font-size scale (xs–5xl) — no MUI Typography variant; use vendored tokens or sx
Layout typography patterns (page-header__title, section__title) — docs-layout only, not theme variants
Typography.userDecision: Native-first typography: all 12 Harmony textStyles map to standard MUI variants (h1–h6, subtitle1/2, body1/2, caption, overline, button). Harmony-named custom variants removed. Single custom variant `code` for mono font. Export HARMONY_TYPOGRAPHY_MAP for consumer reference.
Typography.notes: Typography uses standard MUI variant names only; see HARMONY_TYPOGRAPHY_MAP. Custom `code` variant for mono. Verifier PASS iteration 4 (2026-07-06).

Spacing.notes: Spacing/radius tokens via MUI theme. Verifier PASS iteration 4 (2026-07-06).

Elevations.notes: Shadow/elevation tokens via MUI theme. Verifier PASS iteration 4 (2026-07-06).

Dela.notes: Dela brand/foundation demo at /foundation/dela. Verifier PASS iteration 4 (2026-07-06).

gaps: Button size xs — no native MUI size equivalent; skipped per userDecision
Button orientation vertical — no native MUI Button equivalent; skipped per userDecision
Dela variants — custom DelaButton export (user chose custom over skip)
Button.userDecision: Native-first Button mapping: Harmony variants map to MUI variant+color; pageHeader via palette.pageHeader; xs size and vertical orientation skipped; Dela via custom DelaButton. Consumer API (DelaButton): MUI Button analog — Omit<ButtonProps,'variant'> + pill?; events/slots via ButtonProps; no public variant; default /Stars.svg start icon unless loading or consumer startIcon. See plans/consumer-api-existing.md.
Button.notes: Native MUI Button/IconButton + DelaButton custom export. Demo at /components/buttons. Verifier PASS iteration 2 (2026-07-06).

propMappings.notes: Theme restyles contained into Harmony segmented shell

ButtonGroup.userDecision: existing-mui ButtonGroup; Harmony default→contained (segmented theme), outline→outlined; selection via child Button variants; no ToggleButtonGroup
ButtonGroup.notes: Demo at /components/button-groups; theme in mapButtonGroupToTheme.ts. Verifier PASS iter 3; human accepted visual match via plan execute (2026-07-14).

propMappings.harmony: type / placeholder / value / name / id / disabled / required

propMappings.mui: default variant=outlined (theme); filled/standard remain stock MUI
createHarmonyTheme({ product: cp }) OutlinedInput height 20px, fontSize xs, radius-04

gaps: Auto-generated id when omitted — consumer responsibility (SSR); demos pass explicit id
Input.userDecision: existing-mui TextField; default outlined maps Harmony; filled/standard stock MUI; CP product uses compact 20px density; labels via FormLabel composites; adornments for icons; no HarmonyInput export.
Input.notes: Theme mapTextFieldToTheme.ts. Demo /components/inputs. Plan input-form-controls.md. Verifier PASS input-form-controls-2; human accepted via plan execute (2026-07-15). CP compact density via mapTextFieldToTheme (20px / xs / radius-04); other products use default 40px field.

propMappings.harmony: placeholder / value / name / id / disabled / required

propMappings.mui: createHarmonyTheme({ product: cp }) OutlinedInput height 20px, fontSize xs, radius-04

gaps: Auto-generated id when omitted — consumer responsibility (SSR); demos pass explicit id
No error/icon API in reference — not invented
Textarea.userDecision: existing-mui TextField multiline; same outlined Harmony chrome; no invented error/icon parity.
Textarea.notes: Shared TextField theme. Demo on /components/inputs. Verifier PASS input-form-controls-2; human accepted via plan execute (2026-07-15). CP compact density via mapTextFieldToTheme (20px / xs / radius-04); other products use default 40px field.

propMappings.harmony: value / min / max / step / name / id / disabled

propMappings.mui: createHarmonyTheme({ product: cp }) OutlinedInput height 20px, fontSize xs, radius-04

gaps: Auto-generated id when omitted — consumer responsibility (SSR); demos pass explicit id
NumberInput.userDecision: existing-mui TextField + InputAdornment IconButton steppers composite; no HarmonyNumberInput export; outlined default.
NumberInput.notes: Demo /components/specialty-inputs. Verifier PASS input-form-controls-2; human accepted via plan execute (2026-07-15). CP compact density via mapTextFieldToTheme (20px / xs / radius-04); other products use default 40px field. Specialty Inputs demo restores reference Date and Time example parity (2026-07-20).

propMappings.harmony: value / min / max / step / disabled / name / id

RangeInput.userDecision: existing-mui Slider + Typography value label; theme mapSliderToTheme.ts.
RangeInput.notes: Demo /components/specialty-inputs. Filled track uses primary (rail divider); resync after reference colored-track update. Verifier PASS range-input-filled-track-1 (2026-07-20); reverses prior DEF-002 uniform-gray remediation.

propMappings.mui: parent FormControl error (face color via theme)

Checkbox.userDecision: existing-mui Checkbox; validation colors from parent FormControl; keep default MUI hover; no skipped props; no HarmonyCheckbox export
Checkbox.notes: Theme in mapCheckboxToTheme.ts + mapSelectionControlChromeToTheme.ts. Demo at /components/checkboxes. Verifier PASS iteration 2; human accepted visual match (2026-07-14) via complete-in-progress execute.

compositeEquivalents.composition: FormControl component="fieldset" + FormLabel + FormGroup + FormControlLabel + Checkbox

CheckboxGroup.userDecision: existing-mui FormControl/FormGroup composition; validation from FormControl; no skipped props
CheckboxGroup.notes: Demo at /components/checkbox-groups. Shared chrome in mapSelectionControlChromeToTheme.ts. Dependency on Checkbox synced; human accepted group visual match (2026-07-14) via complete-in-progress execute.

propMappings.mui: same on Radio (name often from RadioGroup)
size prop; large via theme variants

RadioButton.userDecision: existing-mui Radio; size large via theme; validation from FormControl; keep default MUI hover; no skipped props
RadioButton.notes: Theme in mapRadioToTheme.ts + mapSelectionControlChromeToTheme.ts. Demo at /components/radio-buttons. Verifier PASS iteration 2; human accepted visual match (2026-07-14) via complete-in-progress execute.

compositeEquivalents.composition: FormControl component="fieldset" + FormLabel + RadioGroup + FormControlLabel + Radio

RadioGroup.userDecision: existing-mui RadioGroup; name auto-propagates (document vs Harmony manual); validation from FormControl; no skipped props
RadioGroup.notes: Demo at /components/radio-groups. Shared chrome in mapSelectionControlChromeToTheme.ts. Dependency on RadioButton synced; human accepted group visual match (2026-07-14) via complete-in-progress execute.

gaps: variant=segmented (+ optionLabelLeft/Right) — no stock MUI Switch equivalent; skipped per userDecision
Toggle.userDecision: existing-mui Switch + FormControlLabel + mapSwitchToTheme.ts. Skip segmented variant with UnsupportedEquivalentCallout. Map sm/md to Switch size small/medium. No HarmonyToggle export. Approved 2026-07-20.
Toggle.notes: Demo at /components/toggle-switches. Plan plans/toggle-dropdown-accordion.md. Verifier PASS Toggle-2; human accepted via plan execute (2026-07-20).

gaps: type=week skipped — MUI X Community does not ship a WeekPicker
Empty-state whole-field placeholders (Select date/time/month) — MUI X accessible section fields show muted format masks; custom field wrapper declined under existing-mui
Auto-generated id when omitted — consumer responsibility; demos pass explicit ids
DateInput.userDecision: existing-mui MUI X picker family for date/time/datetime/month; skip week type (approved 2026-07-16); accept muted format-mask empties instead of custom field wrappers; label variants use FormLabel + Stack; no HarmonyDateInput export.
DateInput.notes: Theme mapDatePickersToTheme.ts including MuiPickersOutlinedInput. Demo /components/date-picker. DateRangePicker and DateRangePickerExpanded remain separate follow-up. Verifier PASS DateInput-3; human accepted visual match (2026-07-16).

propMappings.mui: Typography caption color=textSecondary beside label text

compositeEquivalents.composition: FormLabel children + Typography component=span variant=caption color=textSecondary

Label.userDecision: existing-mui FormLabel / InputLabel; helper as caption Typography composite; theme mapFormLabelToTheme.ts.
Label.notes: Demo /components/labels. Verifier PASS input-form-controls-2; human accepted via plan execute (2026-07-15).

propMappings.mui: sx width/height 24/32/40 (MUI docs); theme default md 32×32
ButtonBase wrapping Avatar; hover via Avatar theme; soft focus ring via MuiButtonBase theme
ButtonBase disabled; Avatar child opacity 0.5 via theme

compositeEquivalents.composition: ButtonBase wrapping Avatar (MUI Avatar-upload pattern; no file input required)

gaps: Per-size corner radius (4/8/12) and initials font (10/12/14) — theme applies md (8px / 12px) for all sizes; accepted per userDecision
Avatar.userDecision: existing-mui Avatar; theme default variant=rounded; circular/square are MUI supersets; sizes via sx width/height only; md radius+font for all sizes (accepted); interactive via bare ButtonBase; hover under ButtonBase via Avatar theme; ButtonBase soft focus ring via mapButtonBaseToTheme (Button/IconButton clear outline+boxShadow); disabled Avatar opacity 0.5; docs show Default/Disabled only — hover/focus via real interaction (no staging classes; no UnsupportedEquivalentCallout for docs presentation).
Avatar.notes: Theme in mapAvatarToTheme.ts + mapButtonBaseToTheme.ts. Demo at /components/avatar. Soft ring + disabled fade via real pseudo-states; docs omit static hover/focus columns (presentation only, not a functional skip).

propMappings.mui: Card (theme: paper bg, border, radius, shadow-sm)

compositeEquivalents.composition: Card > CardActionArea wrapping CardHeader/CardContent (MUI primary-action pattern)

skippedProps: primary — no MUI Card prop for 6px top theme-primary border
gaps: primary — skipped per userDecision
Card.userDecision: existing-mui Card; elevated→raised; interactive→CardActionArea composite; primary skipped; header via CardHeader composition; no HarmonyCard export.
Card.notes: Theme in mapCardToTheme.ts. Demo at /components/cards. Verifier PASS iter 2; human accepted via plan execute (2026-07-14).

Badge.userDecision: Custom StatusBadge export — Harmony Badge is a non-interactive status label pill with alert-chip colors; not MUI Chip or Badge. Consumer API: HTMLAttributes<span> + sx (MUI-familiar) + variant/size/icon/children; events via HTML attrs; not Chip delete/avatar API. See plans/consumer-api-existing.md.
Badge.notes: StatusBadge in src/components/StatusBadge/; alertChip token colors; demo at /components/badges.

compositeEquivalents.composition: Badge wrapping IconButton or Avatar anchor

skippedProps: size sm/lg — no native MUI Badge size prop; theme targets md dimensions (2026-07-09)
border — no native MUI Badge prop; white ring requires custom slot styling (2026-07-09)
gaps: NotificationBadge size sm/lg — MUI Badge has no size prop
NotificationBadge border — MUI Badge has no border prop
Standalone layout — demos use wrapped Icon/Avatar pattern per userDecision
NotificationBadge.userDecision: MUI Badge wrapper on Icon/Avatar; dot/number via variant and badgeContent; overflow via max; overlap only for anchor positioning (e.g. Avatar); border skipped.

skippedProps: size lg — MUI Chip has only small/medium (2026-07-09)
state hover/focused/pressed — MUI uses CSS pseudo-states (2026-07-09)
gaps: Chip size lg (32px) — no third MUI Chip size
Static state demos — skipped; use interactive chips
Legacy selected prop — skipped
Reference applies cursor:pointer to all chips; MUI conversion uses onClick-only interactivity
Chip.userDecision: MUI Chip via mapChipToTheme; HarmonyIcon for all chip icons; onClick-only pointer/hover; composite dots/overflow in demo; disabled via disabled prop; static states and lg size skipped.
Chip.notes: Theme in mapChipToTheme.ts; hover/cursor scoped to MuiChip-clickable; demo at /components/chips.

propMappings.mui: Compose as Alert children with <Button size="small"> in <Stack direction="row">
Compose as Alert children with <Link href="…"> in action Stack

compositeEquivalents.composition: LinearProgress as Alert child with variant="determinate" value={n} color={severity}

Alert.userDecision: Existing MUI Alert via theme; progressValue composed with LinearProgress child (demo-only inline JSX).
Alert.notes: Theme + demo at /components/alerts. Enhanced with Progress uses default-height LinearProgress (size skipped on ProgressBar). Verifier PASS iteration 7 (2026-07-08).

skippedProps: cornerVariant — no MUI equivalent; sharp one-side corners + hidden arrow (2026-07-10)
gaps: cornerVariant — skipped per userDecision
Tooltip.userDecision: Existing MUI Tooltip via theme. text→title, position→placement, arrow enabled by default. cornerVariant skipped.
Tooltip.notes: Theme in mapTooltipToTheme.ts (CSS vars for light/dark invert). Demo at /components/tooltips. Verifier PASS iteration 2; human accepted visual match (2026-07-10).

Spinner.userDecision: existing-mui CircularProgress; Harmony sizes map to numeric size prop; theme enables track slot and default md size.
Spinner.notes: Theme in mapSpinnerToTheme.ts. Demo at /components/spinner. Verifier PASS iteration 2; human accepted visual match (2026-07-14) via complete-in-progress execute.

propMappings.mui: Compute percentage from value/max before passing to LinearProgress value

skippedProps: size sm/md/lg — MUI LinearProgress has no size prop; user accepted skip (2026-07-08)
gaps: ProgressBar size sm/md/lg — no native MUI LinearProgress size prop; skipped per userDecision
ProgressBar.userDecision: Existing MUI LinearProgress via theme (default md height). size skipped — UnsupportedEquivalentCallout. showLabel composite with Typography.
ProgressBar.notes: Removed invented size prop on LinearProgress. size skipped per AskQuestion; theme default height only. Verifier PASS iteration 4 (2026-07-08).

Icon.userDecision: Custom HarmonyIcon export. Consumer API (SvgIcon slot patterns): name + size/variant/product; fontSize/color/sx/className/titleAccess/ref; decorative aria-hidden; use fontSize="inherit" in MUI icon slots. See plans/consumer-api-existing.md.
Icon.notes: Package HarmonyIcon: manifest SVG, Heroicons fallback, size map aligned with reference; SvgIcon slot compat via fontSize="inherit". Demo at /components/icons. Verifier PASS iteration 2 (2026-07-06).

propMappings.mui: Tabs variant="scrollable" scrollButtons="auto" (MUI native, not the Harmony More menu)

compositeEquivalents.composition: Tabs + sibling IconButton (plus) that appends/selects a tab

gaps: per-tab actions (open/close/⋮) / More overflow menu — browser-tab chrome with no MUI Tabs equivalent; demo UnsupportedEquivalentCallout
variant compact — MUI Tabs variants are layout (standard/scrollable/fullWidth), not Harmony visual chrome; demo UnsupportedEquivalentCallout

variant pill — VP-only product variant (reference componentVariantProducts.TabStrip.pill = [vp]); not converted, demo UnsupportedEquivalentCallout. Converting it is a separate task via the strategy AskQuestion

showAddTab composite (ACC-06, accepted) — add affordance renders as an icon-only "+" IconButton adjacent to the tabs rather than the reference's labeled "+ Add Tab" at the far-right end; same action + accessible name
TabStrip.userDecision: existing-mui: Tabs + Tab themed via mapTabsToTheme (underline indicator, secondary→primary label). Overflow shown via MUI variant="scrollable"; add-tab provided via composition (Tabs + adjacent IconButton). Per-tab close/⋮/More chrome and compact/pill variants skipped with callouts. No package export. See plans/tab-strip-stepper.md.

Stepper.userDecision: existing-mui: Stepper + default StepConnector themed via mapStepperToTheme. Horizontal steppers use alternativeLabel. No package export. See plans/tab-strip-stepper.md.
Stepper.notes: Step must be synced together (Stepper composes Step).

gaps: Step warning status — MUI Step has no warning state; demo UnsupportedEquivalentCallout
Step success status (distinct from completed) — MUI Step has completed + error only; use completed; demo UnsupportedEquivalentCallout

Step error indicator shape — MUI StepIcon renders a warning triangle for the error state; reference uses a filled red circle glyph. Accepted visual divergence (existing-mui; no documented style override reshapes the error icon). User accepted 2026-07-20.
Step.userDecision: existing-mui: Step + StepLabel (+ StepButton for non-linear) themed via mapStepperToTheme. Distinct warning/success statuses skipped with callout (completed/error themed). Error indicator uses MUI's native warning-triangle shape (accepted gap DEF-002; reference is a red circle). No package export. See plans/tab-strip-stepper.md.

propMappings.mui: color="textSecondary" with theme hover to text.primary

compositeEquivalents.composition: Link target/rel + HarmonyIcon name="arrow-top-right-on-square" fontSize="inherit" child

skippedProps: responsive default sizing below 768px — no native MUI equivalent; user accepted skip (2026-07-09)
gaps: Responsive default link sizing — reference media query for implicit-size links; skipped per userDecision
Link.userDecision: Existing MUI Link via theme. size maps to Typography variant (caption/subtitle2/body1). muted via color="textSecondary". external via target/rel + HarmonyIcon composite. Responsive sizing skipped.
Link.notes: Theme in mapLinkToTheme.ts; alert links scoped in mapAlertToTheme. Demo at /components/links. Verifier PASS iteration 2 (2026-07-09).

propMappings.mui: Dialog (open / onClose; React state replaces openDialog / closeDialog)
Theme paper fullWidth + maxWidth=false; paper min/max/width from dialog tokens

compositeEquivalents.composition: IconButton + HarmonyIcon name=x-mark fontSize=inherit in DialogTitle
Button children in DialogActions (Confirm / Cancel / tertiary text)

gaps: resizable — no stock MUI Dialog resize grip; skipped per userDecision
headerVariant primary — no MUI DialogTitle primary-header prop; skipped per userDecision (includes Combined Variants)
buttonAlignment right — no MUI DialogActions align prop; example sx to emulate is forbidden; skipped per userDecision
Dialog.userDecision: existing-mui via Dialog + DialogTitle/Content/Actions + mapDialogToTheme.ts. Skip resizable, headerVariant=primary, and buttonAlignment=right with UnsupportedEquivalentCallout. Theme keeps left footer alignment (Harmony default). No HarmonyDialog export. Approved 2026-07-20; right-align skip added after purity cleanup 2026-07-20.
Dialog.notes: Demo at /components/dialogs. Theme in mapDialogToTheme.ts. Plan plans/dialog.md. Verifier PASS Dialog-2; purity cleanup skip right-align; human accepted visual match 2026-07-20.

gaps: Astro trigger / option-N slots — MUI uses MenuItem children; skipped per userDecision
Dropdown.userDecision: existing-mui Select + MenuItem + mapSelectToTheme.ts. Skip Astro trigger/option slots with UnsupportedEquivalentCallout. Hybrid labels like Input (FormLabel + Stack). No HarmonyDropdown export. Approved 2026-07-20.
Dropdown.notes: Demo at /components/dropdowns. Plan plans/toggle-dropdown-accordion.md. Depends on Icon (synced) and Label (synced). Verifier PASS Dropdown-2; human accepted via plan execute (2026-07-20).

propMappings.mui: uncontrolled multi vs controlled exclusive expanded in demo

compositeEquivalents.composition: Typography/FormLabel above Accordion siblings with role=group

Accordion.userDecision: existing-mui Accordion + AccordionSummary + AccordionDetails + mapAccordionToTheme.ts. Demo-only composition (no items[] package API). Rich bodies via AccordionDetails children. No HarmonyAccordion export. Approved 2026-07-20.
Accordion.notes: Demo at /components/accordion. Plan plans/toggle-dropdown-accordion.md. Depends on Icon (synced). Verifier PASS Accordion-1; human accepted via plan execute (2026-07-20).

DatePicker.userDecision: existing-mui DatePicker; Dayjs adapter values; picker chrome via mapDatePickersToTheme.ts.
DatePicker.notes: Synced with DateInput batch; human accepted DateInput-3 PASS (2026-07-16).

DateTimePicker.userDecision: existing-mui DateTimePicker with Dayjs adapter; 12/24 hour format via ampm.
DateTimePicker.notes: Synced with DateInput batch; human accepted DateInput-3 PASS (2026-07-16).

MonthPicker.userDecision: existing-mui DatePicker configured with year/month views; no custom MonthPicker export.
MonthPicker.notes: Synced with DateInput batch; human accepted DateInput-3 PASS (2026-07-16).

gaps: MUI X Community does not ship a WeekPicker component
WeekPicker.userDecision: Skip WeekPicker and DateInput type=week; approved 2026-07-16. Demo uses UnsupportedEquivalentCallout.

TimePicker.userDecision: existing-mui TimePicker; format maps to ampm and minute step maps to timeSteps.minutes.
TimePicker.notes: Synced with DateInput batch; human accepted DateInput-3 PASS (2026-07-16).

picker toolbar, actionBar, and built-in lifecycle

PickerPopup.userDecision: existing-mui internal picker popper/layout; no standalone PickerPopup export; themed through MuiPickerPopper and MuiPickerLayout.
PickerPopup.notes: Synced with DateInput batch; human accepted DateInput-3 PASS (2026-07-16).

ListItemButton divider on all but last

ListMenu.userDecision: existing-mui List + ListItemButton; no-borders via omit divider; custom icons via img composition; no package export. Plan plans/list-menu.md. Human accepted ListMenu-2 PASS (2026-07-20).
ListMenu.notes: Demo at /components/list-menu. Theme in mapListToTheme.ts. Plan plans/list-menu.md. Verifier PASS ListMenu-2; human accepted synced.
